No errors found.

The provided answer correctly identifies the inefficiency of a naive recursive approach and implements an efficient iterative solution using dynamic programming principles. The explanation clearly outlines the thought process, starting from understanding the problem, exploring the naive solution, analyzing its drawbacks, and then detailing the iterative approach with variable updates. The code is well-commented, handles base cases correctly, and the trace of `fibfib(5)` demonstrates the logic effectively. The time complexity (O(n)) and space complexity (O(1)) are accurately stated for the efficient solution. The added doctests also enhance the clarity and testability of the function.
